items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step requires validation of the feature 'Pre-fill from previous submissions' within the intake form. However, the evidence provided does not include any concrete API reads or checks that confirm the implementation of this feature. As a result, the validation is blocked due to a lack of sufficient evidence to assert either satisfaction or failure of the requirement.
